title: 100 Pcs 5 Inch Metallic Green Balloons - Chrome Latex Balloons for Baby Shower, Jungle Theme Birthday, Wedding, Festival & Party Decorations
features: Premium Material & Safety Made from high-quality latex, these metallic green balloons are durable and non-toxic, ensuring they are environmentally friendly and safe for use in various celebrations. The vibrant chrome finish adds a luxurious touch to your decorations.

Helium & Air Compatibility These balloons can be filled with helium for floating displays or air for long-lasting arrangements. For optimal results, use a hand pump for air inflation or add Hi-Float to extend helium float time.

Versatile Decoration Uses Ideal for baby showers, jungle-themed birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, festivals, and party decorations. These metallic green balloons effortlessly enhance settings like home parties, offices, or outdoor gatherings.

Generous Quantity & Value Each pack includes 100 pieces of 5-inch metallic green balloons, providing ample supply for large events or multiple occasions. Share with friends and family to create memorable moments together.
UK-BASED SUPPORT VGRDTW guarantees responsive assistance for any product queries. Your satisfaction is our priority for stress-free celebrations.
description: Product description Product Details: These metallic green balloons are crafted from high-quality latex, offering a shiny chrome finish suitable for various decorative purposes. Each pack contains 100 pieces of 5-inch balloons, designed to elevate the ambiance of your special events. Key Features: Made from non-toxic, environmentally friendly latex Compatible with both helium and air inflation Vibrant metallic green colour for eye-catching displays Perfect for baby showers, birthdays, weddings, and festivals Important Notes: Balloons may expand up to 90% when inflated; do not overfill. A talcum powder coating is applied to prevent sticking—this is not dirt. Avoid direct sunlight, heat, or sharp objects to maintain balloon integrity. Indoor use is recommended for prolonged durability. Safety Guidance: Suitable for children aged 3 years and above. Adult supervision is required for children under 8 years due to choking hazards from uninflated or broken balloons. Discard any defective balloons immediately. Safety Warning No
